ddls:
CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of content */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the content was published */,
  "commentary" TEXT /* Commentary or title of the content */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest who contributed to the content */,
  "interview_mp3" TEXT /* File path to the interview MP3 file */,
  "interview_pdf" TEXT /* File path to the interview PDF file */,
  "categories" TEXT /* Categories or tags associated with the content */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (article, web presentation, audio file) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* A brief summary of the content */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the content */,
  "publish_status" TEXT /* Status of the content (draft, published, archived) */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Total number of views */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Total number of downloads */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guests" (
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest */,
  "guest_name" TEXT /* Name of the guest */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the guest */,
  "profile_image" TEXT /* Path to the guest's profile image */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the guest's personal or professional website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the guest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_categories" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "profile_image" TEXT /* Path to the user's profile image */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_content" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date the user viewed the content */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user downloaded the content */,
  "comment" TEXT /* User's comment on the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_versions" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the content */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id", "version")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the comment */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes on the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_tags" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "related_content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "related_content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id", "related_content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interviews" (
  "interview_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interview */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date the interview took place */,
  "interview_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interview in minutes */,
  "transcript" TEXT /* Transcript of the interview */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interview_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mp3_files" (
  "mp3_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MP3 file */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the MP3 file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the MP3 file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was uploaded */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mp3_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mp3_files_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pdf_files" (
  "pdf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PDF file */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the PDF file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the PDF file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was uploaded */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pdf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pdf_files_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "money_and_markets" (
  "money_and_markets_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Money and Markets file */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the Money and Markets file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the Money and Markets file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was uploaded */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("money_and_markets_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_money_and_markets_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)
